meta.title: Iran's Fake U.S. Aircraft Carrier & Other Top Stories From Sandboxx News
meta.description:
Subscribe and 🔔 to Sandboxx YouTube so you never miss a video. 

It's Saturday 8 August 2020.  Stay up to date on what's happening in the military with Sandboxx News. 

Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

BRAINSTORMING IN THE BARRACKS: HOW TO MAKE YOUR IDEA INTO A SUCCESSFUL STARTUP
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3aeR4Az

RUSSIA’S SPACE WEAPON TEST AND THE MILITARIZATION OF SPACE
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3aamaZW

THE ‘STEALTH FIGHTER’ THAT WASN’T: WHY WE KEEP GETTING THE F-117 WRONG
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/31AxUkP

IRAN HILARIOUSLY BUNGLES FAKE US AIRCRAFT CARRIER ATTACK
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/31BrKAM

THE 5 BEST MILITARY MOVIES OF THE 1980S
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2PNRGE5

Guest Story | Military Times: 

SOMEONE FINALLY MADE EDIBLE CRAYONS FOR MARINES 
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/30Et9r5

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

0:00 Intro
0:51 Brainstorming in the Barracks 
1:19 Russia's Space Weapon Test
2:33 Why We Keep Getting the F-117 Wrong
3:17 Iran's Fake US Aircraft Carrier Attack
4:23 Top Military Movies from the 1980's
5:24 Edible Crayons for Marines
